assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_075",
  "rule_id": "Enable Certmap in SSSD",
  "category": "requires_human_review",
  "confidence": 0.75,
  "rationale": "The change modifies SSSD authentication settings and can affect user access; it must be reviewed to avoid lockout or misconfiguration.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "auth_configuration_change",
    "potential_lockout"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "Backup /etc/sssd/sssd.conf",
    "Test the configuration in a staging environment",
    "Validate user authentication after changes"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": true,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}

The finding is "Enable Certmap in SSSD". It's about SSSD config for certmap, which is authentication related.
